title: Z's Wildscape
body:
# Please Notice
The mod development has been paused since Zpeaxirious accidentally lost the project files and needs to recreate them. Sorry for the inconvenience

# Z's Wildscape
Z's Wildscape is focused on adding extra biomes and an extra dimension called Thupa without any mod dependencies. This also adds a few items like the "Thupa Portal Key" to open to portal to the other dimension.

# Features
- More Biomes
- Extra Dimension
- More Items

# Current Biomes
- Wildered Forest
- Frozen Plains

# Future Updates
- Texture Updates (almost finished)
- More Biomes (working on it)
- More Blocks
- More Ores
- Food
- More Tools
- More Armour
- Furnace Fuel
- More Mobs & Creatures
